headlines.description: — Jake McCarthy got Colorado started with a leadoff homer, hit a grand slam in a seven-run fifth and drove in a career-high six runs in the Rockies' 15-3 romp over the San Francisco Giants on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jake McCarthy hits 2 HRs, drives in 6 runs in the Rockies' 15-3 romp over the Giants

headlines.description: — Nick Fortes homered and hit a run-scoring double, Junior Caminero added a solo shot, and the Tampa Bay Rays beat the Houston Astros 3-1 on Friday night to extend the longest active win streak in the major leagues to nine games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fortes, Caminero hit HRs, Rays beat Astros 3-1 for 9th straight win

headlines.shortLinkText: Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win
